texto: Right and wrong are determined by the people who hold positions of authority, that's the way it has always been so how then can anyone know this truth you speak of? Don't you see that truth long ago became a shadow of itself, it's a mere echo of the past now... The world is one big moral gray area, it just makes you feel safer that it can be categorized into good and bad that's not actually how it works.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Atsushi Ōkub que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Right and wrong are determined by the people who hold positions of authority, that's the way it h…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, bad, good, com foco em trabalho e good.
